_comment: Example MCP server connections — one per transport type. Copy entries into mcp_connections.json (NOT this file — this stays as the canonical reference) and fill in your env var names. Tools register at runtime as <integration>__<tool_name> on the gateway. Credentials are server-side env vars only — never commit real values to mcp_connections.json. Strict JSON does not allow comments, so each entry uses _-prefixed keys (_transport_type, _docs) which the gateway ignores. See remote-gateway/docs/integrations/ for full recipes per transport type.
